name: @stepwise/desktop
description: Desktop recorder and replay tool for browser workflows.
author: Asher Leong

scripts.build:deps: bun run --filter @stepwise/shared build && bun run --filter @stepwise/server build && bun run --filter @stepwise/client build
scripts.build: bun run build:deps && tsc -b --force tsconfig.json && bun run scripts/sync-entrypoints.mjs && bun run scripts/prepare-bundle.mjs
